title: Forward deployed engineers (FDE) are staff from a product ...
full_text:
0 likes, 0 comments - uxtigers on September 24, 2025: "Forward deployed engineers (FDE) are staff from a product development company embedded at customer sites, adapting existing products to solve specific unaddressed problems while delivering valuable outcomes. They connect high-tech AI labs to customer needs in traditional enterprise firms, doing discovery research for the product teams at headquarters to inform core feature development.
Jakob Nielsen's full article on Forward Deployed Engineers as the New UX Research 👉 https://jakobnielsenphd.substack.com/p/ux-roundup-20250922
Song: Suno 4.5+
Avatar Design: Mystic 2.5
Avatar Outpaint: Seedream 4
Avatar Animation: HeyGen Avatar IV
B-Roll: Veo 3
Base image for B-Roll Animation: Seedream 4
Lyrics:
They call them FDE, it's true,
Engineers with something new.
Sitting with the customer's crew,
Finding what they really do.
Forward deployed, we're breaking new ground,
Learning what customers need, getting around.
From prototype mess to a product that's sound,
That's how the best solutions are found.
Leave your sunny office in Silicon Valley,
Go to freezing Denmark, down some dark alley.
Learn how the real world works in the cold,
That's where true product insights are gold.
Echo Teams know what's gone wrong,
Delta Teams code all day long.
Quick prototypes, not too strong,
But they show where we belong.
Forward deployed, we're breaking new ground,
Working beside them until we have found,
The patterns that matter, the needs that abound,
Solutions that truly astound.
Gravel roads come first, you see,
Custom-built for each company.
Then we pave the highway free,
For everyone who has that need.
AI agents change the game,
No old software is the same.
Watch the humans, learn their pain,
Turn their work to profit gain.
Forward deployed, we're breaking new ground,
Listening closely to every sound.
Building prototypes, spinning them round,
Till value and product are bound.
Discovery means shut your mouth,
Watch them work it all throughout.
Let them show what it's about,
Then you'll know without a doubt.
Old UX meets brand new tech,
Field research keeps us in check.
Build the future, what the heck,
FDE will lead the trek.
#UX #FDE #ForwardDeployed #UXR #Discovery".
